title: Huntress SIEM collection run failed
description: The Huntress SIEM Agent check has entered a CRITICAL state, meaning the last collection run failed. Logs may no longer be flowing from Huntress to Datadog.

definition.name: Huntress SIEM collection run failed on {{host.name}}
definition.message:
The Huntress SIEM Agent check on {{host.name}} has entered a CRITICAL state, meaning the last collection run failed. Logs may no longer be flowing from Huntress to Datadog.

Common causes:
- Invalid or rotated API credentials (`huntress_api_key` / `huntress_secret_key`)
- Network connectivity issue between the Agent host and `api.huntress.io`
- Invalid `esql_query` in the instance configuration
- Huntress SIEM feature not enabled on this account

Check the Agent logs for details:
```
sudo datadog-agent check huntress
```
